rule-one-depreciation-run-per-period.description: Only one posted depreciation run per company per period
rule-one-depreciation-run-per-period.condition: no other DepreciationRun with Status='posted' for same period

rule-book-value-not-negative.description: Accounting book value cannot go below zero

rule-disposed-asset-no-depreciation.description: Disposed assets are excluded from depreciation runs

rule-depreciation-requires-gl-account.description: Asset must have a GL account configured to post depreciation
